title: thymus serpyllum subsp. glabrescens
intro: Thymus serpyllum subsp. glabrescens, also known as glabrous thyme, is a subspecies of the thyme plant that belongs to the mint family Lamiaceae. This herb is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimicrobial, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory compounds, which are known to inhibit the growth of bacteria, viruses, and fungi. The health benefits of Thymus serpyllum subsp. glabrescens include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory function, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and other respiratory issues.
